name: Groq (via LiteLLM proxy)
setup: pip install litellm[proxy] — proxy auto via nexus groq. Compte Groq requis (console.groq.com), sans CB. Tier gratuit avec rate limits ; facturation au-dela. Source : console.groq.com/docs/models, groq.com/pricing
